# SMA Research Platform

> Open-source evidence-first drug research platform for Spinal Muscular Atrophy (SMA)

## What this site provides

The SMA Research Platform aggregates, structures, and prioritizes global SMA evidence automatically. It is designed for researchers, clinicians, and drug developers working on Spinal Muscular Atrophy therapeutics.

## Key facts

- 4,582 PubMed sources ingested and analyzed
- 13,000+ LLM-extracted claims from research abstracts (growing daily)
- 189 prioritized hypotheses ranked in 3 tiers (A/B/C)
- 449 clinical trials from ClinicalTrials.gov
- 21 molecular targets scored across 7 dimensions (10 established + 11 from omics convergence analysis)
- 16 drugs tracked (3 approved + 13 pipeline: Phase 1-3 and preclinical from Cure SMA pipeline)
- 397+ knowledge graph edges (STRING PPI, UniProt GO, KEGG, ChEMBL, conservation, claim-based)
- 226 drug outcomes — structured failure/success database from literature
- 188 compounds screened via RDKit (drug-likeness, BBB, ADMET)
- 57 drug repurposing candidates from cross-disease + ChEMBL cross-reference
- 16 cutting-edge research directions (Querdenker + Harvard-level)
- 53 curated research links across 9 categories
- Daily automated 9-stage pipeline at 06:00 UTC

## Disease context

Spinal Muscular Atrophy (SMA) is a genetic neuromuscular disease caused by loss of the SMN1 gene (chromosome 5q13). It is the most common genetic cause of infant death. Incidence: ~1:10,000 births. Carrier frequency: 1:35-50. SMN2 copy number is the primary severity modifier. Three therapies are approved but there is no cure.

## Molecular targets

### Established targets (scored)
1. SMN2 — Primary therapeutic target, severity modifier (composite score: 89%)
2. SMN1 — Primary disease gene, absent in patients (score: 82%)
3. SMN Protein — Essential for snRNP biogenesis (score: 60%)
4. NCALD — Calcium sensor, knockdown rescues SMA (score: 48%)
5. PLS3 — Natural severity modifier (score: 47%)
6. UBA1 — Ubiquitin homeostasis (score: 43%)
7. MTOR_PATHWAY — Dysregulated in SMA motor neurons (score: 40%)
8. NMJ_MATURATION — Neuromuscular junction defects (score: 39%)
9. STMN2 — Neuroprotective, axonal growth (score: 38%)
10. CORO1C — Actin-binding potential modifier (score: 5%)

### Discovery targets (from omics convergence analysis)
11. LY96 — TLR4 coreceptor, neuroinflammation (score: 40%, 27 claims)
12. NEDD4L — Ubiquitin pathway, related to UBA1 (score: 39%, 40 claims)
13. SPATA18 — Mitochondrial quality control (score: 33%, 15 claims)
14. LDHA — Metabolic reprogramming in SMA motor neurons (score: 31%, 5 claims)
15. CAST — Calpain inhibitor, neuroprotection (score: 27%, 3 claims)
16. SULF1 — ECM remodeling, heparan sulfate signaling (score: 25%, 13 claims)
17. ANK3 — Ankyrin-G, Nodes of Ranvier integrity (score: 25%, 9 claims)
18. DNMT3B — Epigenetic regulation, SMN2 exon 7 modifier (score: 22%, 8 claims)
19. CD44 — Cell adhesion / ECM receptor (score: 22%, 3 claims)
20. CTNNA1 — Cytoskeletal integrity, complements PLS3 (score: 0%, pending)
21. GALNT6 — O-linked glycosylation, NMJ protein maturation (score: 0%, pending)

## Approved therapies

- Nusinersen (Spinraza): ASO targeting SMN2 ISS-N1, intrathecal, approved 2016
- Risdiplam (Evrysdi): Small molecule SMN2 splicing modifier, oral, approved 2020
- Onasemnogene abeparvovec (Zolgensma): AAV9 gene replacement, single IV dose, approved 2019

## API endpoints

All data is accessible via REST API at https://sma-research.info/api/v2/

- GET /api/v2/stats — Platform statistics
- GET /api/v2/targets — All molecular targets with metadata
- GET /api/v2/trials — Clinical trials (449 entries, filterable by status/phase)
- GET /api/v2/drugs — Drug/therapy data (16 entries, filterable by approval_status)
- GET /api/v2/sources — PubMed literature (4,582 papers with abstracts)
- GET /api/v2/claims — LLM-extracted claims (13,000+ structured assertions)
- GET /api/v2/hypotheses — Generated hypotheses
- GET /api/v2/hypotheses/prioritized — Ranked hypotheses with tier assignments (189 entries)
- GET /api/v2/scores — 7-dimension target composite scores
- GET /api/v2/datasets — Curated omics datasets
- GET /api/v2/comparative/species — Model organisms for cross-species analysis
- GET /api/v2/comparative/orthologs/{symbol} — Ortholog mapping across species
- GET /api/v2/research/directions — 16 cutting-edge research directions
- GET /api/v2/research/directions/{id} — Deep-dive with connected targets, claims, hypotheses
- GET /api/v2/screen/candidates — Integrated drug candidate ranking
- GET /api/v2/screen/repurposing — Drug repurposing candidates
- GET /api/v2/drug-outcomes — Drug failure/success database
- GET /api/v2/graph — Knowledge graph nodes and edges (force-directed visualization data)
- GET /api/v2/graph/stats — Graph statistics and edge type breakdown
- GET /api/v2/stats/pipeline — Pipeline run history and extended stats
- GET /api/v2/export/{table}?fmt=json|csv — Export any table (targets, claims, hypotheses, drug_outcomes, etc.)
- GET /api/v2/docs — Interactive API documentation (Swagger)

## Research links

53 curated resources across 9 categories at https://sma-research.info/links/
Categories: Genomic & Molecular Databases, Clinical Trial Registries, Drug & Target Discovery, Protein & Pathway Tools, Literature & Reviews, Patient Organizations, Computational & AI Tools, News & Community, Regulatory & Safety

## Analysis pipeline

Phase 1 (complete): Evidence ingestion → normalization → LLM claim extraction → target linking → network projection → hypothesis generation
Phase 2 (complete): Multi-criteria scoring → hypothesis prioritization → tier assignment (A/B/C)
Phase 3 (complete): Data source expansion — ChEMBL bioactivity (188 compounds), UniProt protein annotations (18 proteins), STRING-DB interactions (10 PPI edges), KEGG pathways (41 genes)
Phase 4 (complete): Cross-species comparative biology — ortholog mapping across axolotl, zebrafish, naked mole rat, C. elegans, Drosophila (55 orthologs, 136 conservation edges)
Phase 5 (complete): Querdenker research directions — cross-disease learning (ALS, DMD, SBMA, CMT), bear hibernation muscle preservation, bioelectric reprogramming (Michael Levin), spatial multi-omics, NMJ-on-a-chip, epigenetic dimming, ECM engineering, SMA as multisystem disease, NDRG1/cell dormancy, RNA decoy, DUBTACs, spinal cord stimulation
Phase 6 (in progress): Computational drug discovery — RDKit screening (188 compounds), ADMET prediction, drug repurposing, integrated candidate ranking. Planned: molecular docking, CRISPR guides, AAV capsid evaluation, dual-target molecules
Phase 7-11 (planned): Advanced analytics, knowledge infrastructure, open data commons, warp-speed infrastructure, translation & impact

## Drug Failure & Success Database

Unique structured resource capturing WHY SMA drugs succeed or fail. 226 outcomes extracted from literature:
- Structured: Molecule → Target → Mechanism → Outcome → Failure Reason → Key Finding
- Outcome types: success, partial_success, failure, inconclusive, discontinued, ongoing
- Failure reasons: toxicity, lack_of_efficacy, poor_bioavailability, off_target_effects, poor_bbb_penetration, manufacturing, commercial, safety_signal

## Technology

Stack: Python / FastAPI / PostgreSQL / Claude Haiku / RDKit / Vanilla JS
All data is freely accessible via the REST API for research purposes.
MCP server available for AI agent integration (12 tools).
HuggingFace dataset: Bryzant-Labs/sma-evidence-graph (9 tables as Parquet).
